targets.name: claude
targets.label: Claude Code
targets.notes: Uses CLAUDE.md natively; most other tools fall back to it

targets.name: codex
targets.label: Codex (OpenAI)
targets.notes: CODEX_HOME env var can relocate; AGENTS.override.md takes priority

targets.name: droid
targets.label: Droid (Factory)
targets.notes: Personal override; also walks up directory tree per-project

targets.name: amp
targets.label: Amp
targets.notes: Also checks ~/.config/AGENTS.md; falls back to CLAUDE.md

targets.name: gemini
targets.label: Gemini CLI
targets.notes: Uses GEMINI.md natively; can configure settings.json to also read AGENTS.md

targets.name: intent
targets.label: Intent (Augment)
targets.notes: Uses ~/.augment/rules/*.md for user-wide rules; always_apply type
